content: The prefrontal cortex's top-down gating of hippocampal memory retrieval during goal-directed learning can be framed as a SOTA active learning selection strategy for agent episodic memory: just as the prefrontal-hippocampal network dynamically retrieves only the contextually relevant memories to guide current decision-making, 2024-2025 cutting-edge active learning agent memory systems can adopt this biological interaction dynamic to avoid the common failure of over-sampling noisy, irrelevant old memories for fine-tuning.
